selection_process: Please refer to the official notification for selection process details.
how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for DSWO Sivaganga Case Worker Recruitment 2026 through offline mode should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Download the application form from the official website: .
Fill the application form carefully with correct information.
Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates.
Check all details carefully before submission.
Send the completed application form to the address mentioned in the notification through Speed Post / Registered Post or as instructed.
Ensure the application reaches before the last date: 29-06-2026.
Keep a photocopy of the submitted application form for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the DSWO Sivaganga Case Worker recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date to submit applications for the Case Worker position at the District Social Welfare Office Sivaganga is 29th June 2026. Ensure your application reaches the office before this deadline.

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are available for the Case Worker post?
faq.answer: There are a total of 2 vacancies for the Case Worker position announced by the District Social Welfare Office Sivaganga in this recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q3. What is the educational qualification required for the Case Worker role?
faq.answer: Candidates must possess a Bachelor's degree in Law, Social Work, Sociology, Social Science, or Psychology to be eligible for the Case Worker position.

faq.question: Q4. What is the age limit for applying to this post?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for candidates applying for the Case Worker post is 35 years. There is no minimum age limit specified.

faq.question: Q5. What is the salary offered for the Case Worker position?
faq.answer: Selected candidates for the Case Worker role will receive a consolidated monthly salary of Rs. 18800.

faq.question: Q6. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee required for any category of candidates (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q7. In which mode should the application be submitted?
faq.answer: Applications for the DSWO Sivaganga Case Worker recruitment must be submitted in offline mode, likely by post, as indicated in the notification.

faq.question: Q8. What is the job type for the Case Worker position?
faq.answer: The Case Worker position is a contractual job, meaning the employment will be for a fixed tenure as per the terms and conditions of the District Social Welfare Office Sivaganga.

faq.question: Q9. Where can I find the official notification and application form?
faq.answer: The official notification and application form can typically be found on the official website of the District Social Welfare Office Sivaganga or through the direct links provided in the "Important Links" section of this article.

faq.question: Q10. What documents are required to be submitted with the application form?
faq.answer: Candidates are generally required to attach self-attested copies of relevant documents such as educational certificates, proof of age, identity proof, and passport-sized photographs with their application form.
